listening.title: Listening: Describing a house
listening.transcript: There is a small garden in front of my house. There are three bedrooms and one bathroom. There is also a kitchen next to the living room.

questions.question: What is in front of the house?
questions.explanation: "There is a small garden in front of my house."

listening.title: Listening: At the furniture shop
listening.transcript: Is there a sofa in this room? No, there isn't a sofa, but there is a table and two chairs. Are there any lamps? No, there aren't any lamps yet.

questions.question: Is there a sofa in the room?
